description: Enhance your media and entertainment webinars with an engaging, colorfully designed invitation. The blend of cool blue and vibrant yellow colors creates an eye-catching appeal, perfect for mobile and app platforms. This template offers a 'book now' feature, providing an easy and immediate call-to-action for your audience. It also showcases a dedicated section for speaker introductions, ideal for webinars where guest speakers are involved. The template is optimized for mobile viewing, ensuring your invite reaches your audience wherever they are. It's more than just an invitation, it's a platform to engage, inform and excite potential participants about your upcoming workshop.
short_description: Invite your audience to your next media and entertainment webinar with our vibrant, mobile-optimized template. With a captivating blend of blue and yellow, an easy 'book now' feature, and a section for speaker introductions, this template enhances audience engagement and excitement for your upcoming workshop.

designer.description: I spend my days crafting gorgeous graphics. I work mainly with small local businesses. I’ve just spent 2 years living in Sweden. I moved back to Russia in October 2015 and am now settled in Moskow. I’m constantly learning design related topics, currently playing around a lot with flyer design for clubs and pubs.
